# terrible_cisco_mso_ndo_ipsla_monitoring_policy (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `template` (String) The name of the template. The template must be a tenant template.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `description` (String) The description of the IPSLA Monitoring Policy.
- `destination_port` (Number) The port used for SLA. This is only applicable when `sla_type=tcp` or `sla_type=http`. The value defaults to 80 when `sla_type=http`. The value must be in the range 1 - 65535 when `sla_type=tcp`.
- `detect_multiplier` (Number) The detection multiplier for SLA. The value must be in the range 1 - 100. The default value is 3.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `http_uri` (String) The URI used for HTTP SLA. This is only applicable when `sla_type=http`. The default value is '/'.
- `http_version` (String) The HTTP version used for SLA. This is only applicable when `sla_type=http`. The default value is `HTTP10`.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `ipsla_monitoring_policy` (String) The name of the IPSLA Monitoring Policy.
- `ipsla_monitoring_policy_uuid` (String) The UUID of the IPSLA Monitoring Policy. This parameter is required when the `ipsla_monitoring_policy` attribute needs to be updated.
- `ipv6_traffic_class` (Number) The IPv6 Traffic Class. The value must be in the range 0 - 255. The default value is 0.
- `operation_timeout` (Number) The operation_timeout for SLA in milliseconds. The default value is 900 milliseconds.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `request_data_size` (Number) The size of the request data in bytes. The value must be in the range 0 - 17513. The default value is 28 bytes.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `sla_frequency` (Number) The frequency of SLA monitoring in seconds. The value must be in the range 1 - 300. The default value is 60 seconds.
- `sla_type` (String) The type of SLA. The default value is `icmp`.
- `state` (String) Use `absent` for removing. Use `query` for listing an object or multiple objects. Use `present` for creating or updating.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `threshold` (Number) The threshold for SLA in milliseconds. The default value is 900 milliseconds.
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `type_of_service` (Number) The IPv4 Type of Service. The value must be in the range 0 - 255. The default value is 0.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
